body_excerpt: In multiple functions of VideoRtpPayloadDecoderNode.cpp, there is a possible out of bounds write due to an integer overflow. This could lead to remote code execution with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足
